age_range.evidence: Measures of happiness for children aged 10–15 from 7 waves of the UK Household Longitudinal Study were examined (n = 7596).

countries.evidence: the present study uses data from the UK Household Longitudinal Study (UKHLS)

sample_size.evidence: Measures of happiness for children aged 10–15 from 7 waves of the UK Household Longitudinal Study were examined (n = 7596).
